name: Max
description: Exports your Max (HBO Max) profile, viewing history with timestamps, recommendations, and saved list using Playwright browser automation.

scopes.label: Your Max profile
scopes.description: Profile information including name and email

scopes.label: Your viewing history
scopes.description: Movies and shows you've watched with timestamps and progress

scopes.label: Your My List
scopes.description: Titles saved to your My List / watchlist
